title: euploca marifolia
intro: Euploca marifolia, also known as the "beach morning glory," is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, and has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Euploca marifolia is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
